message:
feat(storage): add sentinel errors ErrNotFound, ErrNotInitialized, ErrPrefixMismatch

Replace (nil, nil) return pattern with structured sentinel errors throughout
the storage layer. Callers now use errors.Is() instead of nil-checking the
returned issue, making error handling more explicit and composable.

Cherry-picked from PR #1873 (split/02-sentinel-errors) with conflict
resolution for scanner refactoring already on main.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
